Renge
PhilosophyTokensComponentsStart
1 : 1.618

Proportion as a first principle.

Renge is a design system built on natural mathematics. PHI. Fibonacci. The ratios that appear in every living thing.

Explore the system↓
φ = 1.618034...

The argument

Why natural mathematics?

φ

PHI

1.618033...

1φ = 1.618φ² = 2.618

The golden ratio appears in nautilus shells, sunflower spirals, galaxy arms. We built the spacing scale from it.

∑

Fibonacci

1, 1, 2, 3, 5, 8, 13...

The sequence that generates PHI. Every Renge size step follows it. Growth that feels inevitable.

⊙

Phyllotaxis

137.508°

The golden angle. Nature's solution to optimal packing — the logic behind leaves on a stem, seeds in a sunflower.

The system

Every token derived. Nothing arbitrary.

Tokens / Color

Color profiles.

--renge-color-bg

--renge-color-bg-subtle

--renge-color-bg-muted

--renge-color-fg-muted

--renge-color-border

--renge-color-accent

--renge-color-accent-hover

--renge-color-accent-subtle

Tokens / Spacing

Fibonacci spacing.

1
1 × 4 = 4px
2
2 × 4 = 8px
3
3 × 4 = 12px
4
5 × 4 = 20px
5
8 × 4 = 32px
6
13 × 4 = 52px
7
21 × 4 = 84px
8
34 × 4 = 136px

Tokens / Typography

PHI type scale.

Proportion.4xl · 177.44px · φ^5
Proportion.3xl · 109.67px · φ^4
The ratios that appear in living things.2xl · 67.78px · φ^3
The ratios that appear in living things.xl · 41.89px · φ^2
The ratios that appear in living things.lg · 25.89px · φ^1
The ratios that appear in living things.base · 16.00px · φ^0
The ratios that appear in living things.sm · 9.89px · φ^-1
The ratios that appear in living things.xs · 6.11px · φ^-2

Tokens / Motion

Natural easing.

ease-out
ease-in
ease-in-out
spring

Tokens / Radius

Border radius.

1
4px
2
8px
3
12px
4
20px
5
32px
full
pill

Get started

Install and consume.

pnpm add @renge/tokens

CSS custom properties — framework agnostic.

import { createRengeTheme } from "@renge/tokens";

const theme = createRengeTheme({ profile: "clear" });

// Inject into your document
const style = document.createElement("style");
style.textContent = theme.css;
document.head.appendChild(style);
Coming soon

@renge/react

React components built on the token system. Proportional. Accessible. Composable.

Part of the Soka Labs ecosystem.

φ = 1.6180339887
